message:
test(oracle): add 20 conformance tests s80a-s80t probing UPDATE/DELETE ceremony edge cases

All 20 pass, 0 mismatches. Tests cover: UPDATE with arithmetic SET,
DELETE complex WHERE, UPDATE CASE in SET, prepared-statement reuse,
UPDATE/DELETE with subquery WHERE, DELETE EXISTS, multi-UPDATE txn,
INSERT OR REPLACE, UPDATE/DELETE RETURNING, rowid references, BETWEEN,
NULL handling, interleaved DML, IN list, NOT IN subquery.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
